Chocolate is being made

The $CHOC presale starts on June 28 at 14:00 (UTC).

Become a $CHOC owner and receive amazing prizes!
The top 200 buyers in the presale will be awarded the following prizes:
  • iPhone 15 Pro Max
    (21st to 50th place)
  • PlayStation
    (51st to 100th place)
  • Solana 1 SOL
    (101st to 200th place)
  • Tesla Model S Plaid
    (Top Buyer)
  • MacBook Pro
    (2nd to 20th place)
  • iPhone 15 Pro Max
    (21st to 50th place)
  • PlayStation
    (51st to 100th place)
  • Solana 1 SOL
    (101st to 200th place)
  • Tesla Model S Plaid
    (Top Buyer)
  • MacBook Pro
    (2nd to 20th place)
  • iPhone 15 Pro Max
    (21st to 50th place)

How to buy $choc

1

Connect Your Wallet

Connect your MetaMask or other wallet to the purchase window at the top of this website. Follow the purchase window interface to easily buy $CHOC tokens with coins.
2

Prepare Funds

Make sure your buyer's wallet has a sufficient balance. If not, deposit cryptocurrency into your wallet.
3

Purchase $CHOC Tokens

Enter the number of tokens you wish to pay for in the purchase window and proceed with the transaction. Then, approve the transaction from your wallet. Make sure to have enough coins for gas fees.
4

Purchase $CHOC Tokens to Win Prizes

If you have purchased $CHOC tokens, amazing prizes will be awarded to the top 200 buyers after the presale closes. Check your purchase ranking and enjoy special benefits.

Risk Warning: Cryptocurrency trading is highly speculative, involves a high level of risk, and may not be suitable for all investors. You should not speculate with capital that you cannot afford to lose as you may lose some or all of your invested capital. The content on this site should not be considered investment advice. Investing is inherently speculative. Investments may put your capital at risk. We do not allow users from these countries to participate in the presale. The information on this site is not available to any person in Afghanistan, Benin, Bhutan, China, the Crimea region, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Syria, the United States, Vatican City State or any country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local law or regulation.
